summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by removing 'Admin privileges required' error branches from UsersTable and PlatformStats frontend components, and the backend main.mo is present (though truncated). The frontend-file-summaries.txt confirms UsersTable and PlatformStats had their special 'Admin privileges required' error branches removed. The summary also notes admin-only query hooks no longer have '!!identity' guards. The backend changes are truncated but the requireAdmin helper is still present for other functions; there is no direct evidence that the getAllUsers/getUsers backend guard was removed, though the truncation makes this uncertain.

missing_requirements.requirement: Strip any guard in the backend that requires an admin role before returning user data (e.g. in any getUsers, getAllUsers, or similar query).
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not show the getAllUsers or getUsers function body. There is no evidence in the visible diff that the admin role check was removed from the backend user-fetching function. The requireAdmin helper function is still present and unchanged in the visible portion.
